title: Microsoft releases open-source toolkit to govern autonomous AI agents

title: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Identity now supports On-Behalf-Of (OBO) token exchange
snippet: Enables developers to build agents that securely access protected resources on behalf of authenticated users via OBO token exchange, carrying both user and agent identity with scoped-down access tokens.

title: AI Agent Authentication and Authorization (draft-klrc-aiagent-auth-00)
snippet: Initial revision. Describes how AI agents should leverage existing standards (SPIFFE, WIMSE, OAuth, OpenID SSF) for authentication and authorization rather than creating new protocols.

title: A New Identity Playbook for AI Agents in 2026
snippet: Agentic identities are dynamic, ephemeral, and autonomous — unlike traditional service accounts. By 2026, 30% of enterprises expected to rely on AI agents that act independently, triggering transactions and completing tasks on behalf of humans.
